description: Deploy a 4-piece POS system to a newly created retail location using Location-based checkout, and perform a hardware swap for a broken printer at an existing location. Create a new Location named "Store #42 - Chicago" at 100 Navy Pier, Chicago, IL 60611. Check out the assets POS-TERM-042, POS-SCAN-042, POS-PRNT-042, and POS-PAY-042 directly to the "Store #42 - Chicago" Location entity (not to a user). Additionally, manage a hardware swap at "Store #18 - Miami" by checking in the broken printer (POS-PRNT-018), updating its status to "Out for Repair", and checking out the spare printer (POS-PRNT-SPARE) to the Miami location.
